findings_summary: Browser proof captured for screenshots, console, DOM state, a11y basics, overlap and performance note.

a11y.basis: DOM-level accessible-name, title, lang, image alt and landmark checks; not a full WCAG audit.

accessibility.basis: DOM-level accessible-name, title, lang, image alt and landmark checks; not a full WCAG audit.

overlap_check.basis: DOM rectangle intersection scan; nested parent-child overlaps are ignored.

overlap.basis: DOM rectangle intersection scan; nested parent-child overlaps are ignored.

performance_note: desktop render duration 8 ms, dom nodes 102; mobile render duration 6 ms, dom nodes 102; browser-local static proof only, not a production performance benchmark
next_action: Attach product_face_result to the completion receipt.

packet_comparison.basis: Historical Product Face proof predates the stricter packet comparison field; rerun Product Face proof before reusing for product approval.

source_promise_coverage.basis: Historical Product Face proof predates explicit source-promise coverage; rerun against current source promises before reuse.

design_fit_review.basis: Historical Product Face proof predates explicit design-fit review; rerun review before treating this as current design approval.

legacy_schema_backfill: 2026-06-11: added pending Product Face comparison fields to satisfy stricter schema without upgrading historical proof strength.
